mapper.select: SELECT *, 0 AS checked FROM modules WHERE status = 1 AND module_type_id = #{id} ORDER BY ordering ASC

SELECT modules.id, modules.name, modules.status, modules.module_type_id, modules.ordering,
-- Extract type from the name and convert it to uppercase CASE WHEN modules.name LIKE '%(%)%' THEN UPPER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(modules.name, '(', -1), ')', 1)) ELSE NULL END AS type,
-- Check if user has permission CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM permissions WHERE module_id = modules.id AND group_id = #{roleId} LIMIT 1 ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS checked
FROM modules WHERE modules.status = 1 AND modules.module_type_id = #{id} ORDER BY modules.ordering ASC;

SELECT modules.id, modules.name, modules.status, modules.module_type_id, modules.ordering,
-- Extract type from the name and convert it to uppercase CASE WHEN modules.name LIKE '%(%)%' THEN UPPER(TRIM(TRAILING ')' FROM SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(modules.name, '(', -1), ')', 1))) ELSE NULL END AS type,
-- Check if user has permission CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM permissions WHERE module_id = modules.id AND group_id IN (SELECT group_id FROM user_groups WHERE user_id = #{userId}) LIMIT 1 ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS checked
FROM modules WHERE modules.status = 1 AND modules.module_type_id = #{id} ORDER BY modules.ordering ASC;
